creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
If you install into /usr man pages go to /usr/share/man not
into /usr/man. That a special behaviour of /usr and it's expected.
See bsd.port.mk around lines 2884-6. Nothing to be seen here.

That said, it's really a dumb idea trying to push libiconv into /usr

Can we close this ticket?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

What do we know about love? Love is like a pear.  Pear is sweet and have
a specific shape. Try to exactly define the shape of a pear.
  -- Marigold: 50 Years Of Poetry
